material:get_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Returns the ambient lighting value of the material.

return → float ambient

material:set_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets the ambient lighting value of the material.

return → nil

material:reset_ambient.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets the ambient value to its original.

return → nil

material:get_specular.description:

material:set_specular.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

material:reset_specular.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

return → nil

material:reset_diffuse.description:

material:get_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Gets all surface properties (ambient, specular, diffuse) and returns them in a Lua table.

return → table<properties> properties

material:set_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Sets surface properties from a Lua table. Keys: ambient, specular, diffuse.

return → nil

material:reset_properties.description:
MoonAdditions (Dante-1337) — vehicle_object_material

Resets all surface properties to their original values.
